conditions: total >= 0, minimum >= 0, not weights or sum(weights) != 0
description: Checks if the input values are valid before proceeding with bandwidth apportionment.
The function may truncate decimals when converting bandwidth values to integers.
Raises a ValueError if the total bandwidth is negative.
Raises a ValueError if the minimum bandwidth is negative.
Raises a ValueError if the weights are empty or sum up to zero.
Calculates the bandwidth apportioned to each weight, considering the minimum value.
Converts the calculated bandwidth values to integers.
